name: Potato Kisses
recipeInstructions:
1. Pass the hot mashed potatoes through a ricer into a mixing bowl.
2. Beat in the melted butter until well combined.
3. Add the confectioners' sugar and beat until thoroughly blended.
4. Incorporate the cocoa powder or cooled melted chocolate, stirring until smooth.
5. Mix in the vanilla extract and salt.
6. Gradually fold in the coconut flakes.
7. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto wax paper.
8. Shape the mounds into regular-sized balls.
9. Allow the potato kisses to cool in a refrigerator or another cool place for about 30 minutes, until hardened.
10. Store hardened candy in an airtight container.
Makes: approximately 1 1/2 pounds
